task:
OBJECTIVE: Create /Users/srini/Projects/kommit/app/api/transcribe/route.ts

POST handler. Accepts audio file, uploads to S3 via Custodian, runs AWS Transcribe, returns transcript and detected language code.

Imports:
import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from "next/server";
import { TranscribeClient, StartTranscriptionJobCommand, GetTranscriptionJobCommand } from "@aws-sdk/client-transcribe";
import { uploadAudio, deleteAudio } from "@/lib/custodian";

const transcribeClient = new TranscribeClient({
  region: process.env.KOMMIT_TRANSCRIBE_REGION!,
  credentials: { accessKeyId: process.env.KOMMIT_AWS_KEY!, secretAccessKey: process.env.KOMMIT_AWS_SECRET! }
});

Accept multipart form data with field "audio" (File).

Implementation:
1. Read audio file as ArrayBuffer, convert to Buffer.
2. Generate unique key: "audio/" + Date.now() + ".webm"
3. Upload via uploadAudio(buffer, key).
4. Start transcription job:
   await transcribeClient.send(new StartTranscriptionJobCommand({
     TranscriptionJobName: "kommit-" + Date.now(),
     LanguageCode: undefined,
     IdentifyLanguage: true,
     MediaFormat: "webm",
     Media: { MediaFileUri: "s3://" + process.env.KOMMIT_S3_BUCKET! + "/" + key },
     OutputBucketName: process.env.KOMMIT_S3_BUCKET!
   }))
5. Poll every 2 seconds for up to 30 seconds until job status is COMPLETED or FAILED.
   Use GetTranscriptionJobCommand.
6. On COMPLETED: fetch the transcript JSON from the OutputUri using fetch().
   Extract transcript text from results.transcripts[0].transcript.
   Extract language code from LanguageCode field on the job.
7. Delete audio via deleteAudio(key).
8. Return: { transcript: string, languageCode: string }
On any error return 500 with { error: message }.

FILES: /Users/srini/Projects/kommit/app/api/transcribe/route.ts

ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA:
POST handler exported
Uses IdentifyLanguage: true
Polls until COMPLETED
Deletes audio after transcription
Returns transcript and languageCode
No TypeScript errors

TEST: cd /Users/srini/Projects/kommit; npx tsc --noEmit

DO NOT: hardcode bucket names or regions
DO NOT: use ast.parse
